title: "The Summer I Turned Pretty" Season 3 Reaches 70 Million Viewers in 70 Days, Up 65% From Season 2
text: The Summer I Turned Pretty Season 3 reached 70 million viewers within 70 days of the season's premiere, representing a 65% increase compared to Season 2's 70-day viewership total. The finale debuted on September 17, 2025. Among women aged 18-34, this became Amazon Prime Video's most-watched season of television ever. Sixty percent of the audience came from outside the United States, with particularly strong viewership in the UK, Germany, and Brazil. The series became the number 1 title in more than 140 countries' rankings globally. The third and final season consisted of 11 episodes, premiering on July 16, 2025, with two new episodes, followed by a new episode on a weekly basis until the series finale on September 17, 2025. A feature-length film was announced following the series conclusion and is set to serve as a direct continuation of the series finale.
